chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-62 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing. 17-01-2018 Mr. Karamullah Memon advocate for applicant. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon D.P.G. Sindh. Learned counsel for applicant under the instructions of applicant does not press this bail application which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
